sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: 씨티 2025년 4분기 순이익 25억 달러·연간 143억 달러, 러시아 매각 손실 반영

keyPoints.text: 4분기 순이익은 25억 달러, 주당순이익 1.19달러였고 매출은 199억 달러를 기록했다.
4분기 실적에는 러시아 AO 씨티은행 매각 관련 12억 달러(세후 11억 달러)의 손실이 반영됐으며, 이를 제외한 순이익은 36억 달러였다.
연간 순이익은 143억 달러로 전년 127억 달러에서 늘었고, 연간 매출은 852억 달러를 기록했다.

riskChanges.text: 러시아 AO 씨티은행 매각 계획에 따른 보유자산 매각 회계 처리로 4분기에 12억 달러의 손실이 발생했다.

businessChanges.text: 회사는 2025년 전 사업부문에서 사상 최대 매출과 긍정적 영업 레버리지를 달성했다고 밝혔다.
2025년 주주 환원은 176억 달러에 달했으며, 이 중 130억 달러가 자사주 매입이었다.

financialHighlights.text: 4분기 매출 199억 달러, 순이익 25억 달러, 주당순이익 1.19달러를 기록했다.
러시아 관련 일회성 손실을 제외한 4분기 주당순이익은 1.81달러였다.
연간 매출 852억 달러, 순이익 143억 달러를 기록했다.

watchItems.text: 2026년 10~11% RoTCE 목표 달성 경로를 지켜볼 필요가 있다.
러시아 사업 매각 마무리와 자본환원 지속 여력을 확인할 필요가 있다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 c-20260114xex99d1.htm EX-99.1 Exhibit 99.1 ​ ​ For Immediate Release Citigroup Inc. (NYSE: C) JANUARY 14, 2026 ​ ​ FOURTH QUARTER AND FULL YEAR 2025 RESULTS AND KEY METRICS ​ CHAIR AND CEO COMMENTARY ​ ​ Citi Chair and CEO Jane Fraser said, “With record revenues and positive operating leverage for each of our five businesses, 2025 was a year of significant progress as we demonstrated that the investments we are making are driving strong top-line growth. Growth in Services was fueled by deeper client relationships and new client mandates; Markets maintained its top 3 position and improved its returns; Banking played a key role in many of the year’s major transactions; Wealth delivered strong results and launched several significant partnerships; and USPB doubled its returns through a focus on customer engagement and new, innovative products. “We returned over $17 billion of capi  Normalized numeric aliases: $17 billion = 170억 달러; $17 = 17달러.

tal to our shareholders - the most since the pandemic - including $13 billion through share buybacks. We ended the year with a CET1 Ratio of 13.2%, which is 160 basis points above our regulatory requirement. We have ample capital to support our growth while continuing to return excess capital to our shareholders. “We enter 2026 with visible momentum across the firm and are committed to reaching our target of 10-11% RoTCE for the year and positioning Citi for improved returns above that level in the years ahead,” Ms. Fraser concluded. RETURNED ~$17.6 BILLION IN THE FORM OF COMMON SHARE REPURCHASES AND COMMON DIVIDENDS IN 2025 (~$5.6 BILLION IN THE QUARTER) 2025 PAYOUT RATIO OF 133% (5) COMMON EQUITY TIER 1 CAPITAL RATIO OF 13.2% (6) BOOK VALUE PER SHARE OF $110.01 TANGIBLE BOOK VALUE  Normalized numeric aliases: $13 billion = 130억 달러; $17.6 BILLION = 176억 달러; $5.6 BILLION = 56억 달러; $13 = 13달러; $17.6 = 17.6달러; $5.6 = 5.6달러; $110.01 = 110.01달러; $97.06 = 97.06달러; 160 basis points = 160포인트.

urth quarter 2025 of $2.5 billion, or $1.19 per diluted share, on revenues of $19.9 billion. This compares to net income of $2.9 billion, or $1.34 per diluted share, on revenues of $19.5 billion for the fourth quarter 2024. As previously disclosed (1) , fourth quarter 2025 results included a notable item consisting of a loss on sale of $1.2 billion ($1.1 billion after-tax), due to the held for sale accounting treatment related to Citi's plan to sell AO Citibank in Russia, recorded in Other revenues. Revenues increased 2% from the prior-year period, on a reported basis (8) , driven by growth in Banking , Services , U.S. Personal Banking (USPB) and Wealth , primarily offset by a decline in All Other .   Normalized numeric aliases: $2.5 billion = 25억 달러; $19.9 billion = 199억 달러; $2.9 billion = 29억 달러; $19.5 billion = 195억 달러; $1.2 billion = 12억 달러; $1.1 billion = 11억 달러; $2.5 = 2.5달러; $1.19 = 1.19달러; $2.9 = 2.9달러; $19.9 = 19.9달러; $1.34 = 1.34달러; $19.5 = 19.5달러; $1.2 = 1.2달러; $1.1 = 1.1달러.

e tax expense due to the limited tax benefit of the Russia-related notable item (1) , offset by higher revenues and a lower provision for credit losses. Excluding the Russia-related notable item (1) , net income was $3.6 billion. ​ ​ ​ ​ 1 Earnings per share of $1.19 decreased from $1.34 per diluted share in the prior-year period, reflecting lower net income, partially offset by a lower share count due to share repurchases. Excluding the Russia-related notable item (1) , earnings per share was $1.81. For the full year 2025, Citigroup reported net income of $14.3 billion on revenue of $85.2 billion, compared to net income of $12.7 billion on revenue of $80.7 billion for the full year 2024.  Normalized numeric aliases: $3.6 billion = 36억 달러; $14.3 billion = 143억 달러; $85.2 billion = 852억 달러; $12.7 billion = 127억 달러; $80.7 billion = 807억 달러; $86.4 billion = 864억 달러; $3.6 = 3.6달러; $1.19 = 1.19달러; $1.81 = 1.81달러; $86.4 = 86.4달러; $14.3 = 14.3달러; $85.2 = 85.2달러; $12.7 = 12.7달러; $80.7 = 80.7달러.
